description: Legal document explaining arrangements for the ransom of a captive. Dated 29 Nisan 5411 AM (April 1651 CE) involving Yiṣḥaq Castro and Ya'aqov al-Darqon. Location: Cairo. The deed deals with the ransom of a captive Yaʿaqov ha-Levi Ghazāl, originally for a sum of 64 gross[os]– probably a silver coin of European mintage given that Ottoman guruş had not yet entered production. The Sephardi congregation of Damascus and Yaʿaqov ha-Levi Ghazāl's sisters were supposed to contribute the sum but, in the end, both groups could not muster the necessary funds. Negotiations eventually led to a lower ransom of 24 grossos. The signatures section includes the scribe Shelomo b. Shemuel Somekh ha-Kohen, ʿAmram Rajwān, and Ḥayyīm known as ....hager (or הגר?). ASE/MCD.
description_he: מסמך על פדיון שבוי. תאריך: כ"ט ניסן ה'תי"א = אפריל 1651. מקום: קהיר. יצחק קסטרו ויעקב אל-דרקון. יעקב הלוי ג'זאל נפדה לבסוף ב-24 גרוש, לאחר שהפדיון המקורי (64 גרוש) לא גויס.
